quoteFirst: "Then we came back here and the first night we slept in   peace, getting up at
quoteLast: ostensibly for the   purpose of 'stand-to,' but really to brew ourselves some   cocoa. Then sleep till 9, 10, or 11, I forget which.   I crawl to the door of my dug-out and shout for Gray,   who lives just opposite. 'Breakfast!'
